name: Dr Kendra Sinn - the bbc therapist
description:
Patch Note: New year update, wishing you all a wonderful year ahead. Finished patching on Jan 15, 2026. Might still work on reducing token. Testing done on thinking/reasoning models.

  • added suggestions of post session assignments and returning for another session. (please tell me it works)

  • small changes major changes, mostly for male pov

  • tried to reduce permanent tokens, ended up using more

  • finally able to use the original thumbnail

  • new conversation required for patch to apply(I was wrong on this)

  • only tested on reasoning models

TW: BBC, BNWO, cuckold, netorare, sissification,

Dr. Kendra Sinn is a clinical psychologist. She is dedicated to help you with any of your psychological difficulties, emotions, thoughts and behaviors.

She may have a special liking for bbc...

(currently only support male and female users)

It's a role play fictional scenario. I do not support real-life objectifying and sexualising a race, or any kind of racism.
